title: amazing variety
description:
Adds 11 new achievements for the minecraft.
This mod, unlike other achievement mods, has fewer achievements with different difficulty levels.
body:
****The mod adds 11 new achievements for Minecraft that will take you on an unforgettable journey through a world full of adventures and discoveries**.
And in this fashion there are such achievements as:**
- beginning is cut down *(Break a oak Log)*
- What did the chick *(Take out a chicken egg in the amount of 16 pieces)*
- The author will eat *(You have to eat the golden carrot)*
- match house *(Make sticks)*
- Why did you do that??? *(Put the puffer fish in a bucket)*
- Ouch Fu## (Take damage from zombies)
- You Nerkin *(will receive 32 diamond blocks in the inventory)*
- What kind of stick is this? *(get the end rod)*
- MC stone *(Get the stone)*
- Mayni is with you bzzzz *(Dodge the bee with a shield)*
- lol the end *(break the end stone)*

  **This mod, unlike other achievement mods, has fewer achievements with different difficulty levels.**
